description: Perform an internal authority audit of 'https://books.toscrape.com/' using the Link Score metric. Ensure Link Score calculation is enabled and post-crawl analysis is performed. Export the internal crawl data to '~/Documents/SEO/exports/authority_audit.csv'. Create a report at '~/Documents/SEO/reports/top_authority_pages.txt' listing the top 5 URLs by Link Score in descending order along with their scores.
